landing.faq1Question: How can SubIQ help me manage my subscriptions?
landing.faq1Answer: SubIQ keeps your recurring expenses, renewal dates, free trials, payment history, and spending insights together in one subscription tracker. Add the services you use to see what is due and how much you are spending in one place.
landing.faq2Question: How do I track upcoming subscription renewals?
landing.faq2Answer: Add each subscription’s billing period and renewal date, then view upcoming charges in the SubIQ renewal calendar. You can also enable reminders for the subscriptions you do not want to miss.
landing.faq3Question: How can I avoid being charged after a free trial?
landing.faq3Answer: Save the free trial’s end date in SubIQ and turn on a trial reminder. The alert gives you time to review the subscription and cancel with the provider before the paid plan begins.
landing.faq4Question: How can I see how much I spend on subscriptions?
landing.faq4Answer: SubIQ shows estimated monthly costs, lifetime spending, category breakdowns, and month-to-month trends. You can use these insights to find the subscriptions with the biggest effect on your budget.
landing.faq5Question: How do I cancel an Apple App Store subscription?
landing.faq5Answer: Open SubIQ, tap Tools, then choose App Store Subscriptions. SubIQ opens Apple’s subscription settings, where you can select the subscription and tap Cancel Subscription.
landing.faq6Question: How do I cancel a Google Play subscription?
landing.faq6Answer: Open SubIQ, tap Tools, then choose Google Play Subscriptions. SubIQ opens Google Play’s subscription settings, where you can select the subscription, tap Cancel subscription, and follow the instructions.

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help with SubIQ? Find answers about subscription tracking, reminders, totals, cancellation and refund guidance, and your data below.
support.getHelpBody: If SubIQ is not working as expected, contact us with the affected feature, what you expected to happen, and what happened instead. Please do not include passwords, full payment-card numbers, or other sensitive account credentials.
support.deletionApp: To delete a Google-linked SubIQ account in the app, open Settings, select Account, choose Delete Account, and confirm. This permanently deletes the account, its settings, and its saved subscription records.
support.deletionEmail: If you cannot access the app, email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email> with the subject “SubIQ account deletion request.” See the <privacy>account deletion section of our Privacy Policy</privacy> for the data deleted and limited retention exceptions.
support.emailSupportBody: For product help, privacy questions, and data requests, email:
support.responseTime: We typically respond within 24 to 48 business hours.
support.reportIntro: Include the following details in your support email when available:
support.featureBody: Have an idea for SubIQ? Email <email>support@anmisoft.com</email> and explain the problem you would like the feature to solve.
support.legalBody: Learn how SubIQ handles information in our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and review the rules for using the app in our <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms>.
support.faq1Question: How do I add or update a subscription?
support.faq1Answer: Open SubIQ and choose Add Subscription. Select or search for the company, then enter its price, currency, billing period, start date, category, and any trial details. To make changes later, open the subscription and choose the edit option.
support.faq2Question: Why does my monthly total differ from my actual bill?
support.faq2Answer: SubIQ calculates estimates from the subscription details you enter and general exchange rates. Taxes, fees, provider billing rules, exchange-rate changes, trial conversions, and missing or outdated entries can make the actual amount different. Check the provider’s bill for the final charge.
support.faq3Question: How do I enable renewal or trial reminders?
support.faq3Answer: Open a subscription, choose Notifications, enable the reminders you want, and allow notification permission when prompted. If reminders remain unavailable, enable SubIQ notifications in your device settings and return to the app.
support.faq4Question: Can SubIQ cancel a subscription or obtain a refund for me?
support.faq4Answer: No. SubIQ provides informational steps and links for the selected company, but it does not access your provider account, submit a cancellation, or request a refund on your behalf. Complete the process with the provider and verify that it has been confirmed.
support.faq5Question: Are cancellation and refund instructions guaranteed to be accurate?
support.faq5Answer: No. The guidance is generated with AI and current web sources, but provider policies and account screens can change. Instructions may be incomplete or outdated, so confirm important details with the provider’s official support or billing pages.
support.faq6Question: What should I do if a company or logo is missing?
support.faq6Answer: Try searching with the company’s full brand name or website name. If it still does not appear, you can enter the company details manually. Logos are supplied by an external company-directory service and may occasionally be unavailable.
support.faq7Question: How do I delete a subscription or request deletion of all my data?
support.faq7Answer: To remove one subscription, open it and use the delete option. If you created a synced account with Google, open Settings, select Account, choose Delete Account, and confirm. You can also request account and data deletion by emailing support@anmisoft.com.
support.faq8Question: How is my subscription data stored?
support.faq8Answer: SubIQ creates an anonymous Firebase account and stores your subscription records and app preferences in Firebase. If you choose Continue with Google, that account becomes a persistent Google-linked SubIQ account. SubIQ does not receive your Google password.
support.trouble1: Confirm that your device has an active internet connection.
support.trouble2: Close and reopen SubIQ, then retry the affected action.
support.trouble3: Install the latest available version of SubIQ and your device software.
support.trouble4: For reminder issues, confirm that notifications are enabled both in SubIQ and in your device settings.
support.trouble5: For incorrect totals or renewal dates, review the saved price, currency, billing period, start date, trial details, and billing changes.
support.trouble6: For cancellation or refund guidance, retry the request and verify the selected company name and domain.
support.report1: Your device model and operating system version.
support.report2: The SubIQ version shown in Settings.
support.report3: A clear description of the issue and the steps that reproduce it.
support.report5: Any error message shown by the app.
support.report6: Screenshots or a screen recording with sensitive information removed.
